sub_modules.hp_coeff_rom_comb: Pure combinational ROM that returns the exact hard-coded 101 high-pass FIR coefficients quantized at scale 32768.
sub_modules.hp_sample_coeff_product: Pure combinational signed multiplier for one delayed input sample and one FIR coefficient.
sub_modules.hp_accumulate_products: Pure combinational wide accumulator that sums all tap products into a 64-bit signed MAC result.
sub_modules.hp_quantize_shift: Pure combinational fixed-point output formatter that arithmetic-right-shifts the 64-bit accumulator by 15 and truncates to DATA_W+GAIN_W bits.
